---
title: "gapminder EDA 대시보드"
author: "오선민"
date: "2026-06-27"
lang: ko
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons: [github]
    orientation: rows
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    dev: "png"
    dpi: 120
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
options(scipen = 100)

# 루트/ document 어느 곳에서 렌더해도 동작
data_path <- if (file.exists("data/gapminder.csv")) "data/gapminder.csv" else "../data/gapminder.csv"
df <- read.csv(data_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df$continent <- factor(df$continent)

cagr <- function(v0, v1, years) (v1 / v0)^(1 / years) - 1
kab  <- function(x, ...) knitr::kable(x, format.args = list(big.mark = ","), ...)

cont_levels <- levels(df$continent)
pal <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A", "#984EA3", "#FF7F00")
cont_col <- setNames(pal[seq_along(cont_levels)], cont_levels)

d07 <- df[df$year == 2007, ]

# 연도별 단순/가중 평균
simple <- aggregate(cbind(lifeExp, gdpPercap) ~ year, data = df, FUN = mean)
weighted <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(df, df$year), function(d) data.frame(
  year = d$year[1],
  lifeExp_w = weighted.mean(d$lifeExp, d$pop),
  gdpPercap_w = weighted.mean(d$gdpPercap, d$pop))))
comp <- merge(simple, weighted, by = "year")

# 격차 추세
disp <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(df, df$year), function(d) data.frame(
  year = d$year[1],
  sd_life = sd(d$lifeExp),
  ratio_gdp = max(d$gdpPercap) / min(d$gdpPercap))))

# 회귀
m1 <- lm(lifeExp ~ log(gdpPercap), data = df)
r2 <- summary(m1)$r.squared

# 국가별 변화
first <- df[df$year == min(df$year), ]; last <- df[df$year == max(df$year), ]
chg <- merge(first[c("country", "continent", "lifeExp", "gdpPercap")],
             last[c("country", "lifeExp", "gdpPercap")], by = "country",
             suffixes = c("_1952", "_2007"))
chg$lifeExp_증감 <- round(chg$lifeExp_2007 - chg$lifeExp_1952, 2)
chg$CAGR <- cagr(chg$gdpPercap_1952, chg$gdpPercap_2007, 55)

life_2007_w <- round(weighted.mean(d07$lifeExp, d07$pop), 1)
gdp_2007_w  <- round(weighted.mean(d07$gdpPercap, d07$pop), 0)

# 기대수명(생명) 중심 핵심 지표
life_gain   <- round(tail(comp$lifeExp_w, 1) - head(comp$lifeExp_w, 1), 1)  # 1952->2007 인구가중 향상폭
top_country <- d07$country[which.max(d07$lifeExp)]   # 최장수국
bot_country <- d07$country[which.min(d07$lifeExp)]   # 최단명국
life_gap_07 <- round(max(d07$lifeExp) - min(d07$lifeExp), 1)  # 최장수-최단명 격차
```

# 개요 {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "세계 기대수명 (2007, 인구가중)"
list(icon = "heart-pulse-fill", color = "primary",
     value = sprintf("%.1f세", life_2007_w))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "기대수명 향상 (1952→2007)"
list(icon = "graph-up-arrow", color = "success",
     value = sprintf("+%.1f세", life_gain))
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "생명 격차 (최장수국−최단명국, 2007)"
list(icon = "hourglass-split", color = "danger",
     value = sprintf("%.1f세", life_gap_07))
```

## Row {height="80%"}

### Column {width="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Rosling 버블차트 (2007) — GDP × 기대수명, 버블=인구"
ord <- order(-d07$pop)
bcex <- 1 + 8 * sqrt(d07$pop[ord]) / sqrt(max(d07$pop))
plot(d07$gdpPercap[ord], d07$lifeExp[ord], log = "x", pch = 21, cex = bcex, col = "white",
     bg = adjustcolor(cont_col[as.character(d07$continent[ord])], 0.7),
     xlab = "gdpPercap (log scale)", ylab = "lifeExp")
legend("bottomright", legend = cont_levels, pt.bg = cont_col, pch = 21, col = "white", bty = "n")
```

### Column {width="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 요약 (2007, 인구가중)"
cont07 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split(d07, d07$continent), function(d) data.frame(
  대륙 = as.character(d$continent[1]),
  국가수 = nrow(d),
  기대수명 = round(weighted.mean(d$lifeExp, d$pop), 1),
  GDP = round(weighted.mean(d$gdpPercap, d$pop), 0))))
kab(cont07, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "대륙별 기대수명 분포 (2007)"
boxplot(lifeExp ~ continent, data = d07,
        col = cont_col[sort(unique(as.character(d07$continent)))],
        xlab = "", ylab = "lifeExp")
```

# 추세 분석

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "전세계 평균 기대수명: 단순 vs 인구가중"
plot(comp$year, comp$lifeExp, type = "b", pch = 19, col = "gray40",
     ylim = range(c(comp$lifeExp, comp$lifeExp_w)), xlab = "year", ylab = "lifeExp")
lines(comp$year, comp$lifeExp_w, type = "b", pch = 17, col = "darkred", lwd = 2)
legend("bottomright", c("단순평균", "인구가중"), col = c("gray40", "darkred"),
       pch = c(19, 17), lwd = c(1, 2), bty = "n")
```

```{r}
#| title: "lifeExp vs log(GDP) + 회귀선"
plot(df$gdpPercap, df$lifeExp, log = "x",
     col = adjustcolor(cont_col[as.character(df$continent)], 0.5), pch = 19, cex = 0.6,
     xlab = "gdpPercap (log)", ylab = "lifeExp")
xs <- seq(min(df$gdpPercap), max(df$gdpPercap), length.out = 200)
lines(xs, predict(m1, newdata = data.frame(gdpPercap = xs)), col = "black", lwd = 2)
legend("bottomright", legend = cont_levels, col = cont_col, pch = 19, bty = "n")
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "국가 간 기대수명 표준편차 (수렴)"
plot(disp$year, disp$sd_life, type = "b", pch = 19, col = "darkgreen",
     xlab = "year", ylab = "SD of lifeExp")
```

```{r}
#| title: "GDP 최고/최저 배수 (발산)"
plot(disp$year, disp$ratio_gdp, type = "b", pch = 19, col = "darkred",
     xlab = "year", ylab = "max/min ratio")
```

# 순위 & 변화

## Row {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "GDP 성장률(CAGR) 상위 10"
t <- head(chg[order(-chg$CAGR), c("country", "continent", "CAGR")], 10)
t$CAGR <- sprintf("%.2f%%", t$CAGR * 100)
kab(t, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "GDP 성장률(CAGR) 하위 10"
t <- head(chg[order(chg$CAGR), c("country", "continent", "CAGR")], 10)
t$CAGR <- sprintf("%.2f%%", t$CAGR * 100)
kab(t, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "기대수명 감소 국가"
decl <- chg[chg$lifeExp_증감 < 0, c("country", "continent", "lifeExp_1952", "lifeExp_2007", "lifeExp_증감")]
kab(decl[order(decl$lifeExp_증감), ], row.names = FALSE)
```

## Row {.tabset}

```{r}
#| title: "2007 기대수명 상위 10"
kab(head(d07[order(-d07$lifeExp), c("country", "continent", "lifeExp")], 10), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "2007 기대수명 하위 10"
kab(head(d07[order(d07$lifeExp), c("country", "continent", "lifeExp")], 10), row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| title: "2007 1인당 GDP 상위 10"
kab(head(d07[order(-d07$gdpPercap), c("country", "continent", "gdpPercap")], 10), row.names = FALSE)
```
